summary: Create the GESP source registry foundation: file layout, schema, canonical official seeds, secondary source seeds, dependency-free validation, documentation, and verification.
approach: Start with a minimal Node-capable project scaffold because no application code exists yet.
Define registry fields before adding seed data.
Separate official/canonical sources from secondary/practice/auxiliary sources.
Validate seed files without external dependencies.
Document source trust rules so later crawler and classifier work cannot treat mirrors as official.

confidence.pressure_pass: TASK-005 is highest complexity because it must enforce schema invariants without external dependencies; criteria require command-level validation and negative fixture behavior.

notes: Do not implement crawlers in Phase 1.
Do not store full problem statements in Phase 1.
Keep DP rules as source metadata policy only; classification logic belongs to later phases.
